rows.label: qev015891_MSG0001
rows.name:
I wonder why there isn't a bookstore here in
the commercial district. You know? Some place
where I could pick up old books from Earth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0002
rows.name:
I know a lot of that data was lost when the White
Whale crashed, and that what remains has yet to
be organized in any kind of meaningful way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0003
rows.name:
But for the sake of NLA's current residents as
well as future generations, we have a duty to
make such texts available to any who want them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0004
rows.name:
Plus then I could finally get my hands on that book I've
been looking for about the French Revolution! Anyway,
yeah... I really hope they open a store like that soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, for now I guess I'll
just search the provisional
government's public database.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0006
rows.name:
There's got to be someone around
here who would know how to find
the data I'm looking for, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0007
rows.name:
Pulling anything out of all that raw
data is such a damn hassle. It'd help
if I knew where to start looking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_JNK0010
rows.name: Help[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that a Bias named Sajif Scoppio could help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_JNK0020
rows.name: Prod[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_SEL0021
rows.name: Urge Beats to find the data himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0008
rows.name:
What, seriously? The Bias read
books? ...I figured they'd
just eat 'em or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0009
rows.name:
And you're saying that this Bias
is actually interested in Napoleon?
That is so...unexpected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0010
rows.name:
You know, the title of my
undergraduate thesis was "The
Crimes and Punishment of Napoleon."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0011
rows.name:
I hold some pretty critical opinions
about the guy, so I'm not sure if your
Bias buddy and I would see eye to eye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I'd sure like to talk to him
and find out! Anyway, thanks for
the tip. I really appreciate it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0013
rows.name:
Yeah, I guess it's always when you're searching
for some specific book that you end up chancing
upon new discoveries and bits of knowledge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0014
rows.name:
So maybe I shouldn't resist
doing the searching myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0015
rows.name:
All right, you've convinced me. I'll just have
to think back to the days I spent wandering my
college library in search of reference material.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0016
rows.name:
And I suppose while I'm at it, I can
put in an official request for someone
to start organizing the data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015891_MSG0017
rows.name:
That way, future generations
will more easily be able to
learn about humanity's history.[ST:wait ]
